description: Brand voice validation rules for Carisma Spa & Wellness

forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use sensory or emotional language instead

forbidden_phrases.reason: Aggressive sales talk (conflicts with peaceful tone)

forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Make it personal: 'You're not just welcome. You belong.'
Focus on transformation: 'A sanctuary, even if only for an hour'
Use sensory language: 'Ease the tension. Feel whole again.'

validation_rules.name: check_second_person
validation_rules.description: Warn if message doesn't use second-person perspective
validation_rules.threshold: Should contain at least one 'you' or 'your'

validation_rules.name: check_sensory_language
validation_rules.description: Warn if message lacks sensory words (optional for short responses)
validation_rules.threshold: Recommended for messages longer than 2 sentences

validation_rules.name: check_clinical_language
validation_rules.description: Warn about clinical or technical jargon

feedback_templates.missing_second_person:
💡 Tone Tip
Try using 'you' or 'your' to create intimacy.
Example: "You deserve a moment of stillness."
feedback_templates.lacks_sensory_language:
💡 Tone Tip
Consider adding sensory words: warmth, stillness, breath, gentle, ease
Example: "Ease the tension. Let go. Feel whole again."
feedback_templates.clinical_language_warning:
⚠️ Tone Check
This sounds clinical. Try sensory language instead:
"{suggestion}"
